title: ModCraft | A Moderation System
description: A system for moderation that is linked to Discord/Telegram
body:
ModerationCraft is an essential moderation plugin tailored for Minecraft servers, equipping administrators with the tools they need to oversee player interactions and foster a positive community environment. With its user-friendly features and seamless Discord integration, this plugin helps ensure that your server remains welcoming and enjoyable for every player.

Key Features:

- Player Reporting System: Players can easily report misconduct by others with a detailed reason, ensuring that community standards are upheld.
- 
- Discord Integration: Every report submitted in-game is automatically sent to a specified Discord channel via a customizable webhook. This real-time notification system keeps your moderation team informed and ready to act, whether they’re in-game or away from the server, to setup it just go to 
```
/plugins/ModerationCraft/config.conf
```

- 
- Admin Report Management: Server administrators can view and manage reports directly within the game, making it simple to take action against rule-breakers.
- 
- Banning Functionality: Admins have the ability to ban disruptive players with specific reasons and set expiration times for bans, ensuring that moderation actions align with server policies.
- 
- User-Friendly Commands: Commands like /report, /checkreports, /ban, and /checkbans are designed for easy use by both players and administrators.
- 
- Custom Configuration: Tailor the plugin settings to fit your server's needs, including the ability to modify the Discord webhook URL for report notifications.

Perfect for Server owners looking to enhance moderation capabilities and foster a friendly, rule-abiding community. Whether you run a small server or a large network, ModerationCraft / ModCraft provides the essential tools to keep your server safe and enjoyable!
